basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 5 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 for the Khordha district.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker recruitment is 25-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: There is 5 vacancy available for the Anganwadi Worker post in the Women and Child Development Odisha.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly Online.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Worker position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article or via the official WCD Odisha website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of WCD Odisha for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment is http://engagementatwc.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Odisha apply for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for specific eligibility regarding domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key steps to apply online?
faq.answer: Key steps include visiting the official website, filling the application form, uploading documents, and submitting the form before the deadline.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find details about the selection process?
faq.answer: Detailed information regarding the selection process will be available in the official notification PDF.
